name: Rolls-Royce Holdings PLC
description: A global leader in power systems for aviation, naval and energy markets.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Civil aerospace recovery driving engine flying hours. Defence order book growth. Power Systems margin expansion.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Structural cost reductions, shift to higher-margin aftermarket. Large engine delivery ramp-up.
assumptions.risks: Supply chain disruption, widebody recovery pace, FX exposure, legacy engine warranty costs.
assumptions.catalyst: Engine flying hours exceeding pre-COVID. Defence budget increases across NATO. Share buyback programme.
